title: [podman-5.8] backport of the fix for `EvalSymlinks` on Windows
body:
<!--- Please read the [contributing guidelines](https://github.com/containers/container-libs/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md) before proceeding --->

Backport of:
- #612

comments.body: @Luap99 @mheon I have prepared this to backport the fix https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/27763. If you planned to create a single PR with more backports, feel free to close it.
btw just as a preference if you cherry pick I like to use `git cherry-pick -x -s` which adds the original commit id to the commit message for easier tracking where this commit originated.
